findings.description: PascalCase record type names `DataRecord` and `TrailerRecord` appear in the title record code examples but are absent from s2 hints. These are searchable names users may query when working with title record multi-format definitions.
findings.source_evidence: Source title record multi-format example defines `[DataRecord]` and `[TrailerRecord]` record types.

findings.description: Configuration property `quoting-delimiter` is used in the title record multi-format code example but is missing from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block: `quoting-delimiter: "\""      # 囲み文字`
